calendar.matters:
Mtn For Atty Fees
Off Calendar Oct-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

J. Phlip Martin, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and moving party David Fox.
No appearance by Defendant or Responding party. No Opposition on file.
Plaintiff David Fox's Motion for Attorney's fees pursuant to CCP 1033.5 Civil Code 1717.
After argument of counsel the court ordered Motion for Attorney's fees in against Defendnt Mall Teen Cards, LLC., in the amount $35,750.00.
Counsel to submit Order granting motion for attorney's fees and Proposed Amended Judgment within five days.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Thomas T. Kim, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff DAVID FOX.
Josh Brownstein, Esq., present in court.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant MALL TEEN CARDS, LLC.

Plaintiff David Fox sworn and examined.
Exhibits presented to the court and admitted in evidence.
On Order of the court Promissory Note was cancelled by the clerk.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff DAVID FOX and against Defendant MALL TEEN CARDS, LLC. in the amount of $176,546.49. As prevailing party, Plaintiff shall be entitle to recover cost of suit.

Judgment signed in open court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2013 Set For Trial On Jun-16-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MALL TEEN CARDS, LLC and MICHAEL FERGUSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar per the request of the moving party. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
